description: Add province color to the Coin Distribution popup (Reparto de Monedas). Currently the province name is rendered without color styling. Use PROVINCE_COLORS from types/game.ts.
steps: In src/components/BattlePanel.tsx, find ALL instances where the coin distribution popup renders the province name. These are around lines 532-536 and any similar places within the coinDistributionPending block (there appear to be multiple: one for the online waiting state, one for remainder=0 info state, and one for the interactive distribution state).

For each province name display in the coin distribution popup, change from plain text to colored text using PROVINCE_COLORS[pending.battleProvinceId]. Example: `

{province?.name || pending.battleProvinceId}

`
PROVINCE_COLORS is already imported in BattlePanel.tsx (line 4: `import { CLANS, PROVINCE_COLORS, SEASON_CARDS_DATA } from '../types/game';`), so no new imports needed.
acceptance_criteria: The province name in ALL variants of the coin distribution popup is displayed in the province's designated color from PROVINCE_COLORS
findings: Added color and fontWeight styling to all 3 province name displays in coin distribution popup. PROVINCE_COLORS was already imported.
